_comment: Source of truth for `engram whats-new`. Each entry corresponds to a released version. Keep items user-facing — describe what users can now do, not internal changes. `added`/`changed`/`breaking`/`deprecated`/`removed` are rendered verbatim; `fixes_summary` is a one-line roll-up so we don't enumerate every bugfix. Updated alongside CHANGELOG.md by the /release skill.

versions.headline: engram visualize now works from release binaries.

changed.title: engram visualize — UI embedded in the binary
changed.summary: Release binaries now ship with all UI assets embedded. Source-clone contributors using `bun link` must run `bun run build` before `engram visualize` will serve; a friendly error points to this when assets are missing.
changed.migration: From a source clone, run `bun run build` before `engram visualize`. Release binaries from install.sh need no action.

versions.fixes_summary: engram visualize now works from release binaries — previously the compiled binary had no embedded UI assets.

versions.headline: Narrative CLI surface, temporal time-travel, repo-lifecycle health, and 8 new source languages

added.title: engram sync — config-driven multi-source ingestion
added.summary: Orchestrate git, GitHub, source-code, and plugin adapters in one pass from a single `.engram.config.json`. Preferred entry point over chaining individual `ingest` commands.

added.title: engram brief — grounded briefing for a PR, issue, or topic
added.summary: Assembles a briefing pack for a specific PR, issue, or topic — with evidence and co-change context baked in.

added.title: engram why — narrate history and rationale
added.summary: Explains the history and rationale of a file, symbol, or line using commit messages, PRs, and ownership signals.

added.title: engram onboard — briefing for a new contributor
added.summary: Guided briefing for a new contributor entering an area of the codebase, with suggested reading and key people.

added.title: engram diff — temporal diff of substrate and projections
added.summary: Compare the graph (or a projection) across two time points to see what changed and when.

added.title: engram context --as-of <when>
added.summary: Retrieve a context pack reflecting what the graph knew at a past point in time — time-travel for your knowledge graph.

added.title: engram update — self-updater
added.summary: Probe for new releases with --check, or download and atomic-replace the binary. Refuses to touch dev installs.

added.title: engram whats-new
added.summary: See what changed in the versions you upgraded across. Bumps your last-seen marker so the doctor drift nudge clears.

added.title: engram doctor — freshness and update checks
added.summary: New checks: how stale each ingestion source is (days + commits behind HEAD), engine version drift, and update availability.

added.title: Source ingestion — 8 more languages
added.summary: Tree-sitter parsers for Go, Python, Rust, Java, Ruby, C, C++, C#, and Starlark/BUILD join TS/JS.

added.title: Kubernetes operator graph
added.summary: Go source now extracts kubebuilder RBAC markers and controller-runtime SetupWithManager watches as first-class edges.

added.title: Google Workspace adapter
added.summary: Ingest Google Docs with revision-aware episodes — the first mutable-source adapter landing ADR-007 in production.

added.title: Monorepo-aware source exclusions
added.summary: engram ingest source now honors .engramignore and skips vendor/build directories via heuristics — no more bloated graphs on monorepos.

added.title: engram plugin install / uninstall
added.summary: Install first-party plugins (gerrit, google-workspace) from the monorepo into your user-wide plugins directory.

changed.title: Gerrit is now a plugin, not built-in
changed.summary: The hardcoded `engram ingest enrich gerrit` subcommand is gone. Gerrit now auto-registers via the plugin loader.
changed.migration: Run `engram plugin install gerrit` once; existing flags (--scope, --endpoint, --token) are unchanged.

changed.title: engram visualize — design refresh
changed.summary: Web UI rebuilt with Geist font and Tailwind. Projections now appear as nodes in the graph, and a new source-type filter lets you hide/show episodes by origin.

versions.fixes_summary: UX audit sweep across the CLI, mobile viz sidebar/layout fixes, and a restored RBAC extractor.

versions.headline: Projection layer, multi-provider AI, and the .engram directory format

added.title: engram reconcile — projection maintenance loop
added.summary: Two-phase loop: `assess` refreshes stale projections; `discover` surveys uncovered substrate and proposes new ones. Supports --phase, --scope, --max-cost (token budget), --dry-run, --reset-cursor, --cross-refs.

added.title: engram project — explicit projection authoring
added.summary: Author a single projection on a specific anchor with declared inputs — useful for targeted decision pages or entity summaries.

added.title: engram export wiki
added.summary: Materialize active projections to a markdown folder (one file per projection) for reading or committing.

added.title: Projection authoring via Anthropic, Gemini, or OpenAI
added.summary: Auto-detected from the exported API key. Set `ENGRAM_AI_PROVIDER` for explicit selection when multiple keys are present.

added.title: Built-in projection kinds
added.summary: `entity_summary`, `decision_page`, `contradiction_report`, `topic_cluster`. User-defined kinds loadable from $XDG_CONFIG_HOME/engram/kinds/.

added.title: Source-code ingestion
added.summary: Walks the working tree and extracts file/module/symbol entities via tree-sitter for TypeScript and JavaScript.

added.title: Plugin system
added.summary: XDG-based plugin loader with js-module and executable transports. `engram plugin list` shows discovered plugins.

changed.title: .engram is now a directory, not a flat file
changed.summary: SQLite and related state live in `.engram/`. Old flat-file databases are not automatically migrated.
changed.migration: Run `engram doctor --fix` on an existing flat file, or recreate the graph.

changed.title: Enrichment adapters use --scope, not --repo
changed.summary: `--repo` still accepted for one cycle with a deprecation warning.
changed.migration: Update scripts to pass `--scope <project>` where they used `--repo`.

changed.title: Retrieval ranking improved
changed.summary: Config noise filtered; term-matching entities rank higher.

removed.title: engram-mcp transport
removed.summary: MCP server replaced by `engram context` for agent integration — a single pack-based API.
removed.migration: Agents that called the MCP server should switch to `engram context <query>`.

versions.fixes_summary: 15 fixes across status, embed, reconcile, visualize, search, export, and markdown ingest.

versions.headline: Initial release — .engram format, git ingestion, hybrid retrieval

added.title: .engram format
added.summary: Single-file SQLite schema with versioned migrations, metadata, episodes, entities, edges, and evidence chains.

added.title: Git VCS ingestion
added.summary: Walks git history to extract authors, files, co-change patterns, ownership signals, and bus-factor edges — no API tokens needed.

added.title: GitHub enrichment adapter
added.summary: Pulls PR discussions, linked issues, and review comments into the graph.

added.title: Markdown and text ingestion
added.summary: Ingest `.md` and plain-text documents as episode sources.

added.title: Full-text search and hybrid retrieval
added.summary: FTS5-backed keyword search blended with vector similarity when an AI provider is configured.

added.title: Knowledge decay detection
added.summary: Surfaces edges whose evidence is stale relative to recent activity.

added.title: Ownership risk report
added.summary: Bus-factor analysis — surfaces files and modules with single-owner concentration.

added.title: Integrity verification
added.summary: Checks graph invariants: evidence coverage, temporal consistency, orphan detection.

added.title: engram visualize — web graph UI
added.summary: Local web UI backed by Cytoscape.js with pan/zoom, typed node/edge styling, search-to-focus, temporal time slider, and decay/ownership overlays.

added.title: Pluggable AI provider layer
added.summary: `null` (FTS-only, default), `ollama` (nomic-embed-text), and `gemini` (gemini-embedding-001) providers.

versions.fixes_summary: 3 fixes across hybrid search scoring, EngRAMark dataset, and CI permissions.
